pricing_subtitle: Pay as you go. Pick a pack that fits your volume — every pack stays valid for a full year.
pricing_empty: No packs are available right now. Please check back shortly.
checkout_failed: We couldn't start checkout. Please try again.
orders_subtitle: Every pack you've purchased. Download invoices whenever you need them.
orders_empty_subtitle: Once you buy a pack, it will show up here.
orders_invoice_failed: Couldn't load the invoice. Please try again.
success_confirming_subtitle: Hang tight — this usually takes a few seconds.
success_subtitle: Your pack is ready. Redirecting you to the dashboard…
success_failed_subtitle: We couldn't confirm your payment in time. If Stripe charged you, the pack will arrive shortly — check your orders in a minute.
success_missing_session: We can't find a checkout session in this link.
cancel_subtitle: No charge was made. Taking you back to the packs…
signup_gift_description: We've added {{pages}} free pages to your account so you can try Ztract right away. Happy extracting!
